title: Application Monitoring
description: Application performance, uptime, HTTP/TLS detail and host health for vedicpanchanga.com.

panels.title: Status
panels.description: End-to-end probe of /api/health through Cloudflare + Nginx + backend.

panels.title: Requests / sec
panels.description: Backend request throughput from the FastAPI Prometheus metrics.

panels.title: Total requests
panels.description: Cumulative requests since the backend last started.

panels.title: Probe targets
panels.description: Current status of every monitored endpoint.

panels.title: HTTP phase durations
panels.description: DNS, connect, TLS, processing, transfer (public health URL).
